articles.title: ‘We will get to a deal’: Trump predicts imminent breakthrough for US-India trade agreement after blasting past tariff policies
articles.description: Donald Trump also referred to past trade imbalances, alleging that India had imposed high tariffs on American goods.

articles.title: India, UK launch initiatives for minerals, maritime cooperation
articles.description: India and the UK have launched a Critical Minerals Global Supply Chain Observatory and signed an MoU for a Regional Maritime Security Centre of Excellence during UK Foreign Secretary Yvette Cooper's visit. The two nations also reviewed progress in trade, technology, and defense, aiming to strengthen their future-oriented partnership.

articles.title: Did this L&T-backed AI stock actually crash 90% in one day? Here's all you need to know
articles.description: E2E Networks appeared to plunge nearly 90% in a day after its 1:10 stock split took effect, but the move was purely a price adjustment. The AI-focused cloud computing company actually hit the 5% upper circuit post-split. Backed by L&T, the stock has surged over 127% in 2026 so far.

articles.title: Vedanta demerger: How will the mega restructuring impact dividend payouts for shareholders?
articles.description: Vedanta has completed a major demerger, splitting into four new companies. Investors are now assessing how this restructuring will affect the company's tradition of consistent dividend payouts. While Vedanta is expected to remain a dividend-paying entity, the absolute dividend per share may decrease. Shareholders will need to evaluate each demerged company individually for their income requirements and potential returns.

articles.title: US Stock Market: Private credit funds face fresh redemption test as investor withdrawals remain elevated
articles.description: Private credit funds catering to wealthy investors are coming under renewed pressure as redemption requests remain elevated in the second quarter. Early filings reviewed by Reuters indicate that concerns over software-sector exposure, asset valuations, and limited transparency are continuing to weigh on investor sentiment and fuel scrutiny of the fast-growing private credit market.

articles.title: BWSSB to set up Bengaluru Global Water Innovation Network
articles.description: BWSSB to set up Bengaluru Global Water Innovation Network

articles.title: 'He is a good friend of mine': Trump praises PM Modi, says US and India will get to a trade deal
articles.description: US President Donald Trump expressed optimism about reaching a trade agreement with India soon, stating that the previous trade imbalance has now reversed. Both nations have been engaged in constructive negotiations, aiming to finalize an interim trade pact while broader discussions continue. Despite ongoing talks, concerns remain regarding potential US tariffs on imports from several economies, including India.

articles.title: RBI MPC key takeaways: Here are the major announcements by Governor Sanjay Malhotra on GDP, inflation and repo rate
articles.description: RBI Monetary Policy 2026 Takeaways: In the previous MPC, the Reserve Bank of India has maintained its key repo rate at 5.25 percent. The central bank also kept its policy stance neutral. This decision comes as India navigates a weaker rupee and aims to support economic growth. The RBI has projected GDP growth for FY26 and FY27. Inflation forecasts have also been provided for the coming quarters.

articles.title: Asian stocks poised to edge lower, oil steadies
Silver prices tank Rs 5,700/kg, gold down Rs 1,300/10 gm as Iran war uncertainty stokes inflation worries. Time to sell?
articles.description: Gold and silver prices saw a sharp decline on the Multi Commodity Exchange on Friday. Renewed Middle East tensions and inflation worries weighed on market sentiment. MCX silver futures for July 2026 delivery dropped significantly, as did gold futures for August 2026 delivery.

articles.title: Karnataka CM DK Shivakumar Allocates Portfolios To Newly Sworn-in Cabinet, Keeps Finance
articles.description: Karnataka Chief Minister DK Shivakumar has allocated portfolios to his newly sworn-in Cabinet, keeping finance and personnel departments for himself while distributing key ministries to senior colleagues.

articles.title: Secure Some Extra Storage With These Early Amazon Prime SSD and HDD Deals
articles.description: Amazon Prime Day isn't for a few weeks, but we've found some early deals on what has turned out to be the most sought after sale items of the year in tech: simple storage space.

articles.title: PM rooftop solar scheme set for 7.5 million milestone
articles.description: India's PM Surya Ghar Muft Bijli Yojana is set to reach over 7.5 million homes by year-end, with 4 million already benefiting. The scheme, launched in February 2024, aims to boost rooftop solar adoption, especially for families using 1-3 kW of electricity. Over 6.5 million applications are in the pipeline, indicating strong public interest and momentum.

articles.title: Ola Electric’s QIP boost; AMFI benches Stable Money
articles.description: Happy Friday! Ola Electric has raised fresh capital through a QIP. This and more in today's ETtech Morning Dispatch.

articles.title: Finance minister, mayor inspect city wards
articles.description: UP finance minister Suresh Khanna inspected four Lucknow Zone-4 wards, ordering encroachment removal, plot cleaning, better parking and drain completion by June 19.

articles.description: ​Circle rates surge in villages along expressway corridor in Lucknow

articles.title: Rajesh Exports likely to lose PLI beneficiary status, face MCA probe
articles.description: Rajesh Exports faces potential removal from a government battery production incentive scheme. The corporate affairs ministry is considering a probe into the company's financial reporting. This follows a Securities and Exchange Board of India order flagging significant overstatement of revenues. The company's chairman stated no official communication has been received yet. The situation is developing rapidly.

articles.title: LDA to launch 3 residential schemes in June
articles.description: Lucknow Development Authority to launch Naimish Nagar, Varun Vihar and Wellness City housing schemes in June; registrations, lottery allotments and rates announced.

articles.title: Kuku targets $360M IPO at $1.8B valuation; and Dhan wants to Groww the Gen Z investor pie and TCS among 6 firms picked for Govt AI projects | MC Tech3
articles.description: In today’s Tech3 from Moneycontrol, digital entertainment startup Kuku Technologies confidentially files for an IPO targeting a valuation of nearly $1.8 billion as microdramas and AI-led content creation fuel growth. We also look at Dhan’s new investing app Millions and its push to attract Gen Z investors, the government’s first empanelled list of AI vendors for public-sector projects, and Bengaluru-based quick commerce startup FirstClub raising $55 million to fund expansion. From IPOs and investing apps to AI policy and fresh funding, here are the biggest startup and tech stories of the day.

articles.title: India should audit existing FTAs to assess effectiveness: Report
articles.description: After the trade deal, India's exports to the UAE have risen by $13 billion over the past four years, while imports have increased by $24 billion

articles.description: Bitcoin price today: The ⁠biggest crypto ⁠token has tumbled more than 15 per cent since Monday.

articles.title: Think that dollar salary means a better life? Purchasing Power Parity tells a different story
articles.description: A higher salary in dollars does not automatically guarantee a better lifestyle. Finance experts say comparing incomes using exchange rates alone can be misleading, as Purchasing Power Parity (PPP) often reveals that everyday expenses in developed economies can erode much of the apparent income advantage.

articles.title: How much money is enough? Doctor explains why a Gurgaon man earning ₹40 lakh and driving a BMW feels poor
articles.description: A doctor shared the story of a BMW-driving professional earning ₹40 lakh annually who feels poor, highlighting how shifting lifestyles and rising expectations, not just income, redefine perceptions of wealth. This "modern poverty" stems from a widening gap between achievements and tenfold increased expectations, leading to a lack of meaning beyond finances.

articles.title: Rajesh Mehta Says Bulkiness Of Docs May Have Led To SEBI's 'Confusion' - Watch
articles.description: Mehta refuted SEBI's allegations of revenue inflation, arguing that the regulator's observations were based on a misunderstanding of the difference between revenue and gross profit.

articles.title: FIIs net sell shares worth Rs 4,447 crore, DIIs net buy Rs 4,360 crore on June 4
articles.description: During the session, DIIs purchased shares worth Rs 16,824 crore and sold shares worth Rs 12,464 crore. Meanwhile, FIIs bought shares worth Rs 14,013 crore but sold shares totalling Rs 18,460 crore

articles.title: LPG supply stable, but oil firms still losing nearly Rs 700 on every cylinder sold
articles.description: Oil Marketing Companies are still facing significant under-recoveries of nearly Rs 700 per domestic LPG cylinder. Despite government efforts to boost domestic production and secure imports, this financial strain persists. Meanwhile, LPG demand has moderated due to reduced commercial use and improved delivery systems, ensuring stable supplies.

articles.title: Govt announces Rs 10,000 crore ATF price stabilisation for airlines
articles.description: The Centre announced a Rs 10,000 crore Aviation Turbine Fuel (ATF) price stabilisation mechanism for Indian airlines to ensure stability in air services and shield passengers from the impact of extraordinary volatility in global fuel prices.

articles.title: Hazira: Why the tank plant PM Modi will visit on Friday matters
articles.description: Prime Minister Modi's upcoming visit to L&T's Hazira plant highlights its growing significance in India's defence manufacturing. The facility, a hub for heavy engineering, has produced the K-9 Vajra artillery guns, with more on order, and the innovative Zorawar light tank. L&T is also developing a Futuristic Infantry Combat Vehicle, positioning Hazira as a key defence production centre.

articles.title: Hindalco launches its flagship Eternia experience centre in Delhi
articles.description: To showcase its premium aluminium windows and doors portfolio

articles.title: Neutral R R Kabel; target of Rs 2020: Motilal Oswal
articles.description: Motilal Oswal recommended Neutral rating on R R Kabel with a target price of Rs 2020 in its research report dated June 03, 2026.

articles.title: InfoBeans Technologies receives ISO 42001:2023 Certification
articles.description: The certification, issued by Staunchly Management and System Services, recognizes InfoBeans for conforming to globally established standards in AI governance, risk management, responsible development, and lifecycle oversight across its internally developed and third-party AI solutions.

articles.title: India's Crude steel production up around 3% in May 2026
articles.description: India's steel sector sustained its growth trajectory in May 2026, recording year-on-year gains across key production and consumption indicators. Crude steel production reached 14.21 million tonnes in May 2026, up 2.9% year-on-year (YoY). Hot metal production grew 2.0% YoY, while pig iron output (0.77 million tonnes) posted a growth of 1.1% YoY. Finished steel production reached 13.94 million tonnes in May 2026, up 7.7% YoY. Finished steel consumption in May 2026 was 14.33 million tonnes, registering growth of 9.0% YoY.

articles.title: Will RBI hike rates or keep them unchanged? How Indian markets may react
articles.description: RBI policy decision is due on Friday. Economists expect rates to stay unchanged, but markets are also pricing a possible rate hike in India, as per reports.

articles.title: Barometers turns rangebound; pharma shares advance
articles.description: Market participants also remained on the sidelines ahead of the Reserve Bank of India's (RBI) monetary policy announcement scheduled for 5 June 2026. Investors are closely monitoring the central bank's policy stance and commentary on economic growth and inflation.

articles.title: Govt to use AI for machine-readable standards to cut compliance costs
articles.description: The Consumer Affairs Ministry is planning to develop machine-readable, SMART standards using artificial intelligence tools to reduce compliance burden on industry, a senior official said on Thursday. Machine-readable standards translate regulatory requirements into structured digital rules that computer systems can process directly, enabling automatic compliance verification without manual intervention. SMART (Standard Machine Accessible, Readable and Transferable) formats go a step further by being dynamic, constantly updated and integrated into software and manufacturing lifecycles. Addressing a FICCI-organised event here, Consumer Affairs Secretary Nidhi Khare said the department was looking at ways to leverage emerging technologies, particularly AI, to modernise the country's standards ecosystem. "We also understand that the emerging technologies which are coming up in a big way, especially the AI, it may be creating a lot of disruption, and it could be creating more challenges

articles.title: Yamuna Expressway Industrial Development Authority's planned VIP route to Noida Airport is set to drive growth across key sectors
articles.description: A new 120-metre-wide VIP route is planned near Noida International Airport. This route will improve connectivity to the airport and key economic areas. It is expected to boost property demand in residential, commercial, and industrial sectors. This infrastructure development will enhance livability and attract new investments. The Yamuna Expressway region is becoming a prime real estate destination.

articles.title: "There is some...": What Rajesh Exports said in 5-pointer clarification post SEBI's order
articles.description: Rajesh Exports has shared a clarification with the exchanges post their requisite, where the company refuted all the alleged remarks flagged by SEBI.

articles.title: Oil, Gas Stocks to Buy: ONGC, Indian Oil Among ICICI Securities Top Picks Post Q4 Results
articles.description: ICICI Securities remains selectively positive on the oil and gas sector following the Q4 FY26 earnings season, highlighting that strong performance by OMCs, CGDs drove overall growth.

articles.title: Buy Ahluwalia Contracts India; target of Rs 1009: Anand Rathi
articles.description: Anand Rathi is bullish on Ahluwalia Contracts India recommended buy rating on the stock with a target price of Rs 1009 in its research report dated June 04, 2026.

articles.title: Professor clicked unknown link, lost Rs 2.6 lakh: Delhi High Court relieves SBI of liability
articles.description: The Delhi High Court was hearing an appeal filed by State Bank of India (SBI) challenging a single judge’s order directing the bank to pay Rs 2.60 lakh to a computer science professor.

articles.title: IT needs selectivity, not blind bargain hunting; Energy, defence and healthcare offer better opportunities: Gurmeet Chadha
articles.description: Market expert Gurmeet Chadha advises investors to be selective in the IT sector, despite attractive valuations, focusing on stock-specific opportunities. He highlights stronger growth visibility in energy, defence, healthcare, and capital market plays, while suggesting midcap IT firms are better positioned for AI monetization.

articles.title: Kotak Alts closes $1bn real estate fund as ADIA, NPS Korea place fresh bets
articles.description: ADIA anchors the fund with its sixth consecutive commitment to Kotak Alts' real estate platform, while NPS Korea makes its maiden investment in Indian alternatives

articles.description: The proposed changes are aimed at improving the attractiveness of Indian sovereign debt for overseas investors.

articles.description: Seoul broadens talent visa access and allows firms to hire more skilled foreign workers

articles.title: Annapurna Bhandar Rs 3,000 Payment Update: Check Your Application Status Online in Minutes
articles.description: The Annapurna Bhandar scheme is a financial support program for women in West Bengal. Beneficiaries can now easily check their application and payment status online through the West Bengal Social Security Portal.

articles.title: Priyank Kharge backs BK Hariprasad, warns of 'real economic crisis'
articles.description: Priyank Kharge backs new KPCC chief BK Hariprasad, appointed to replace DK Shivakumar, and warns of an economic crisis. The AICC announced the change after Shivakumar reportedly took charge as Karnataka CM, with G Parameshwara as his deputy.
